title: Bedrock-Like Dirt
description: This resource pack turns dirt into bedrock! (Removes the grass texture)
body:
## ❔What does this do?
This resource pack basically turns dirt into bedrock! This can be nice to troll friends with, or just to have a cursed gameplay!

I think it works in all versions, but correct me if i'm wrong.

## ✅Features

Replaces the dirt texture to a bedrock one, which can be used to troll in servers, or just with friends!
## 📷 Screenshots
